seoDescription: Diesel generators from 5 to 20 kVA for rental or purchase, engineered for reliable site power.

hero.heading: Diesel Generators 5-20 kVA
hero.body: Diesel generators from 5 to 20 kVA for rental or purchase, engineered for reliable site power.

sections.title: Diesel Generator Range: 5-20 kVA
sections.body: Our range is intentionally focused on diesel generators between 5 and 20 kVA to match common industrial and commercial site requirements.

cards.title: 5-8 kVA
cards.description: Compact diesel sets suited to temporary offices, amenities, and small essential circuits.

cards.title: 10-15 kVA
cards.description: Mid-size diesel generators for workshops, pumping, and continuous day-to-day site duty.

cards.title: 16-20 kVA
cards.description: High-output 16-20 kVA diesel units for heavy temporary demand and dependable backup.

sections.title: Sizing, Delivery, And Support
sections.body: We support each diesel generator package with load review, delivery coordination, and lifecycle service planning.

cards.title: Load Assessment
cards.description: We confirm startup currents, running loads, and runtime targets before unit allocation.

cards.title: Rental Or Purchase
cards.description: The same 5-20 kVA diesel range is available through short-term rental or direct purchase.

cards.title: Maintenance Coverage
cards.description: Scheduled service and responsive repairs keep 5-20 kVA diesel units reliable throughout operation.
